qa_pair.question: Using the lab-automation MCP server on its default simulation backend, set up the deck and report how many pipetting channels the liquid handler has.
On the default simulation backend, set up the deck. What is the PyLabRobot definition name of the tip rack that is auto-loaded onto the deck?
On the default simulation backend, set up the deck. What is the PyLabRobot definition name of the plate that is auto-loaded onto the deck?
On the default simulation backend, set up the deck. What is the class name of the deck that the chatterbox backend builds?
The transfer tool performs a single head pass. With the default 8-channel head, what is the maximum number of wells one transfer call can move at once?
Run the zero-motion connect check against the default (simulation) server. What is the value of the "simulated" field in its result?
The plate-reader tool supports three modes. Which mode uses both an excitation wavelength and an emission wavelength?
The aspirate tool constrains its volume argument in its input schema. What is the maximum allowed volume, in microliters?
On the default simulation backend, set the heater-shaker temperature to 42 degrees Celsius. What value does the tool read back for temperature_c?
Inspect the tool annotations on the deck-state tool. Which boolean annotation hint is set true to signal that the tool makes no changes? Give the hint's field name.
